name: Initial Orthopedic Assessment
description: Comprehensive musculoskeletal assessment by experienced physiotherapists to determine the most appropriate care pathway for your condition.

name: Structured Rehabilitation Program
description: Targeted, progressive exercise programs designed to improve strength, mobility, and function for musculoskeletal conditions including osteoarthritis.

name: Nutrition & Wellness Education
description: Evidence-based education programs covering nutrition, weight management, and lifestyle strategies to support musculoskeletal health.

name: Surgical Pathway Referral
description: For patients who meet the threshold for surgical consideration, we support appropriate referral to orthopaedic specialist teams.

name: Group Exercise Classes
description: Supervised group rehabilitation sessions at Zingari Richmond Football Club Gym, providing peer support and structured progressive exercise.

name: Self-Management Strategies
description: Learn practical strategies to manage your condition independently, including pain management techniques, activity modification, and home exercises.

name: Progress Review Assessment
description: Scheduled follow-up appointments to review your progress, adjust treatment plans, and determine next steps in your care pathway.

name: Diagnostic Imaging Referral
description: When clinically indicated, we can refer you for appropriate imaging investigations such as X-rays or MRI scans to support diagnosis.
